scripts.phpstan: wp-env --config=.wp-env.tests.json run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer run-script phpstan
scripts.lint-php: wp-env --config=.wp-env.tests.json run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer run-script lint
scripts.format-php: wp-env --config=.wp-env.tests.json run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer run-script format
scripts.test-php-coverage: wp-env --config=.wp-env.tests.json run cli --env-cwd=/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)") vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml.dist --coverage-clover build/logs/php-coverage.xml
scripts.test-php-multisite-coverage: wp-env --config=.wp-env.tests.json run cli --env-cwd=/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)") vendor/bin/phpunit -c tests/phpunit/multisite.xml --coverage-clover build/logs/php-coverage-multisite.xml
